name: pagination-demo
visual_summary: A pagination-demo component is a responsive UI element displaying page numbers, typically used for navigation in long lists or search results. It helps users navigate through multiple pages efficiently. Developers can use this component to display pagination on websites or applications, allowing users to jump to different pages.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready loader component with the following characteristics:

Name: pagination-demo
Description: A pagination-demo component is a responsive UI element displaying page numbers, typically used for navigation in long lists or search results. It helps users navigate through multiple pages efficiently. Developers can use this component to display pagination on websites or applications, allowing users to jump to different pages.
Style: modern, responsive
Interactions: clickable, scrolling
Tags: pagination, navigation, list

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
